search.label: Find a hash tool
search.placeholder: Search by algorithm, use case, or output size
search.description: Try SHA-256, bcrypt, checksum, HMAC, RIPEMD, or 128-bit.

filters.label: Filter by tool family
filters.emptyDescription: Try a broader algorithm name, remove a size, or switch back to all families.

cryptographic.name: Cryptographic digests
cryptographic.description: Generate MD, SHA, SHA-3, BLAKE, RIPEMD, SM3, Keccak, and Whirlpool digests for text or files.

password.name: Password hashing and KDFs
password.description: Create or verify password hashes and derive keys with browser-local Argon2, bcrypt, PBKDF2, and scrypt tools.

keyed.name: Keyed hashes and integrity
keyed.description: Build HMAC values, SRI attributes, and keyed hashes for authentication or tamper checks.

checksum.name: Checksums and fast hashes
checksum.description: Use CRC, Adler-32, MurmurHash, CityHash, and xxHash for compatibility, bucketing, and non-security checks.

notes.title: Choose the right hash
notes.body: Use SHA-256 or SHA-512 for general integrity, HMAC for keyed authenticity, Argon2 or bcrypt for passwords, and fast checksums only when security is not the goal.
